title: PCIE2 Controlled Migration — HALTED at Phase 2 (readiness fail)
verdict: HALT — DO NOT enable PCIE2. Readiness gate FAILED.

phase1_evidence.legacy_function_stubs: pinterest-automation + pinterest-live-pin-repair-execute return HTTP 410 Gone with code LEGACY_PUBLISHER_REMOVED
phase1_evidence.ci_legacy_guard: PASS (695 edge function files scanned, 0 violations)
phase1_evidence.verdict: PASS — no path can POST /v5/pins outside pcie2-publisher.

pcie2_headline_library.blocker: Publisher cannot select a headline. Gate fails closed.

pcie2_creatives.blocker: No creative briefs exist. Publisher has nothing to render.

pcie2_pipeline_trace.blocker: Pipeline has never run end-to-end. Cannot prove provenance.

phase2_readiness_matrix.verdict: FAIL — 3 RED blockers. Canary cannot run.

phase3_feature_flag_diff.action: NOT APPLIED. Flag normalization deferred until Phase 2 unblocks.

phase4_snapshot.rollback_instructions: UPDATE app_config SET value=jsonb_extract_path(snapshot.app_config, key) FROM pcie2_migration_snapshots snapshot WHERE snapshot.id='aef3d102-e6b9-4eb7-af39-df87227bea1f';

phase5_8_status: BLOCKED — cannot proceed until Phase 2 readiness blockers cleared.
remediation_required_before_retry: Run pcie2-headline-engine (or equivalent) to populate pcie2_headline_library — minimum 5 approved headlines per functional class × 18 classes = 90 rows.
Run pcie2-creative-brief-generator across the 100 highest revenue_priority products to seed pcie2_creatives.
Execute pcie2-publisher in `mode: dry_run` for ≥25 products and confirm pcie2_pipeline_trace rows are written with all 13 provenance columns populated.
Expand pcie2_hook_library from 24 to ≥50 (≥2 hooks per functional class).
Re-run this migration with the same plan; Phase 2 must return all-green.
next_action_recommended: DO NOT flip pcie2_publish_enabled. Run the three remediation items above, then re-invoke the controlled-migration runbook.
